## Summary

Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat (new behavior)
- [ ] fix (bug fix)
- [ ] docs (documentation)
- [ ] refactor/chore

## Validation

- [ ] Tests run (`pytest -q`) or rationale provided
- [ ] Manual flow verified (if applicable)
- [ ] No secrets committed

## UI Notes (if applicable)

- [ ] Screenshots or concise before/after notes included

## Docs

- [ ] README updated
- [ ] docs/* updated
- [ ] changelog updated (if user-visible)
